purpose: Register operator-provided external corpora that should inform FATHIYA agents through retrieval and policy-gated playbooks.

corpora.title: Awareness, Knowledge Roadmap, and Security Corpus
corpora.policy_boundary: Use for knowledge, lab planning, detection engineering, and owned-scope preparation only. Live external testing, exploitation, credential access, destructive actions, third-party activity, and real-money trading require explicit scope, an applicable tool contract, approval, and a receipt.
approval_required_for: external webhooks, workflow activation, or publication
real-money trading or broker order placement
